preferred_name: average influence of relative permittivity on point level

preferred_name_ml.en: average influence of relative permittivity on point level

definition: change in output of a point level measuring device caused by a change in the process relative permittivity with respect to reference conditions, expressed as the average error across the specified process relative permittivity range

definition_ml.en: change in output of a point level measuring device caused by a change in the process relative permittivity with respect to reference conditions, expressed as the average error across the specified process relative permittivity range
definition_ml.de: Änderung des Ausgangssignals eines Grenzstandmessinstruments, verursacht durch eine Änderung der Permittivitätszahl gegenüber den Referenzbedingungen, als Durchschnittswert des Fehlers über den spezifizierten Prozesspermittivitätszahlbereich

synonyms.name: average influence of dielectric constant on point level

synonyms_ml.en: average influence of dielectric constant on point level

raw_properties.MDC_P004.en: average influence of relative permittivity on point level
raw_properties.MDC_P007.en: average influence of dielectric constant on point level
raw_properties.MDC_P006.en: change in output of a point level measuring device caused by a change in the process relative permittivity with respect to reference conditions, expressed as the average error across the specified process relative permittivity range
raw_properties.MDC_P006.de: Änderung des Ausgangssignals eines Grenzstandmessinstruments, verursacht durch eine Änderung der Permittivitätszahl gegenüber den Referenzbedingungen, als Durchschnittswert des Fehlers über den spezifizierten Prozesspermittivitätszahlbereich
